name: ChatGPT
description: The most popular AI chatbot by OpenAI. Answer questions, write code, create content, and translate languages with natural conversation.

name: Gemini
description: Google's AI assistant with image recognition, video analysis, and real-time internet access for up-to-date information.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant with exceptional reasoning, long document analysis (200K+ words), and coding capabilities.

name: DeepSeek
description: Powerful open-source AI model with exceptional reasoning for coding, mathematics, and technical writing.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that provides answers with real citations. Combines search and AI chat in one interface.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's state-of-the-art image generator that creates high-quality images from detailed text descriptions.

name: Leonardo AI
description: Advanced AI image generation platform with fine-tuned models for art, design, and game assets. Rich control over style.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator that excels at rendering accurate text inside images. Great for logos, posters, and typography designs.

name: Canva AI
description: All-in-one design platform with AI image generation, templates, and editing tools for creating professional graphics instantly.
free: Free tier with basic AI features

name: GitHub Copilot
description: GitHub's AI coding assistant now free for everyone. Provides intelligent code completions and chat support in your editor.

name: Cursor
description: AI-powered code editor with built-in GPT-4o. Write, debug, and refactor code using natural language commands.

name: v0.dev
description: Generate production-ready UI components and full websites with AI. Built by Vercel, works with React and Tailwind CSS.

name: Bolt.new
description: Prompt, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web apps directly in your browser. No local setup needed.

name: Replit
description: Online IDE with built-in AI agent for building, deploying, and hosting apps. Supports 50+ languages with zero config.

name: Codeium
description: Free AI code completion and chat that works in 40+ editors. Unlimited autocomplete suggestions with no usage caps.

name: Vercel
description: The easiest platform to deploy frontend apps. Automatic HTTPS, global CDN, instant previews for every git push.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative. PostgreSQL database, authentication, storage, and real-time subscriptions.

name: Excalidraw
description: Open-source virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn style diagrams. Collaborative, end-to-end encrypted, no sign-up.

name: Figma
description: Industry-standard collaborative design tool. Create UI/UX designs, prototypes, and design systems with your team in real-time.

name: Penpot
description: Open-source design and prototyping platform. True SVG-based, works in browser, perfect alternative to Figma for teams.

name: Unsplash
description: The internet's best source for free high-resolution photos. Over 3 million images, all free for commercial use, no attribution needed.

name: Photopea
description: Free online Photoshop alternative. Supports PSD, AI, and Sketch files. Works entirely in the browser, no installation needed.

name: Coursera Free Courses
description: Access thousands of university-level courses for free. Learn programming, data science, business, and more from top institutions.

name: Khan Academy
description: Completely free education platform covering math, science, computing, and humanities. From kindergarten to college level.

name: freeCodeCamp
description: Learn to code for free with interactive tutorials. Earn verified certifications in web development, data science, and more.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, wikis, and projects. Powerful database views, templates, and team collaboration.

name: Obsidian
description: Powerful knowledge base that works on local Markdown files. Graph view, plugins, and 100% offline-first. Your notes stay yours.

name: Raycast
description: Blazingly fast macOS launcher to control your tools with a few keystrokes. Extensions, clipboard history, window management.

name: DeepL Translate
description: The world's most accurate machine translation tool. Handles 30+ languages with natural-sounding results and context awareness.

name: Windsurf
description: AI-powered IDE from Codeium. Native AI flows that understand your entire codebase. Free alternative to Cursor with better context.

name: Tailwind CSS
description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs. Most popular CSS framework with excellent documentation.

name: Ray.so
description: Create beautiful code screenshots instantly. Perfect for sharing code on social media, blogs, or presentations.

name: tldraw
description: Infinite canvas whiteboard for drawing, diagramming, and whiteboarding. Open-source with excellent developer SDK.

name: Gauthmath
description: AI-powered math solver. Take a photo of any math problem and get step-by-step solutions instantly. Covers all levels.

name: Microsoft Copilot
description: Microsoft's free AI assistant powered by GPT-4. Built into Edge browser, Windows, and available as a standalone app.

name: Gamma
description: Create beautiful presentations, documents, and webpages with AI. Just type a topic and get a polished, ready-to-share design.

name: Trello
description: Visual project management tool with boards, lists, and cards. Simple Kanban-style workflow for teams and personal projects.

name: Remove.bg
description: Automatically remove image backgrounds in 5 seconds. Uses AI to detect foreground and create transparent PNGs instantly.
